title: meibomia subsericea
intro: Meibomia subsericea, also known as silky meadowsweet, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the legume family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Meibomia subsericea include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Meibomia subsericea can be made into a salve or infused oil, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
